# IVA

IVA implements a five-ledger value system to make organizational value visible.

Public brand: IVA
Legal name: Integrated Value Architecture LLC
Contact: evan@ivasolution.com
Location language: Based in Illinois. Working nationally.
Founder: Evan Foster

## Core position

IVA helps organizations identify where value is being delayed, duplicated, hidden, protected, or lost across Financial, Operational, Capacity, Learning and Innovation, and Externalities and Equity ledgers.

IVA is not a generic consulting framework. It is a five-ledger value system used to clarify operating issues, decision paths, reporting burdens, capacity constraints, evidence gaps, learning loss, external obligations, and equity impacts.

- Home: https://ivasolution.com/

## Services

- Five-Ledger Advisory Call: $200/hour, 1-hour minimum, prepaid before scheduling.
- In-Person or Group Five-Ledger Session: $200/hour, 2-hour minimum, travel terms may apply.
- Five-Ledger Value Snapshot: starting at $3,000.
- Structural Diagnostic: starting at $12,000.
- Five-Ledger Workshop or Briefing: $200/hour for preparation, delivery, and follow-up unless quoted as fixed-fee.
- Five-Ledger Implementation Sprint: starting at $25,000.
- Full Five-Ledger Value System Implementation: by proposal.
- Value Governance Support: starting at $2,500/month.
